news.t: 3 Socially Responsible ETFs For Impact Investing

holdings.infoBox: JUST is an equity ETF with a total of 468 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.23%, Apple at 7.07%, Microsoft at 4.91%, Amazon.com at 4.81%, and Alphabet at 3.55%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs JUST U.S. Large Cap Equity ETF (JUST) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the JUST US Large Cap Diversified index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US-listed large-cap stocks selected based on a survey-based assessment of business behavior. JUST was launched on Jun 7, 2018 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: 3 Socially Responsible ETFs For Impact Investing
data.text: Jim Woods, the editor of The Deep Woods and a contributor to MoneyShow.com highlights three ETFs that offer long-term exposure for Socially Responsible Investors.
